message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.40 for release

Key changes since 0.2.39:
- fix(tui): ensure base schema on TUI sync connections — fixes blank
  Messages/Threads screens and Search "table not found" errors caused by
  startup race between TUI observability connections and pool init gate
- fix(tui): add self-healing connection recovery — screens automatically
  drop broken DB connections and retry with 5-second backoff
- fix(tui): replace silent .ok() error swallowing with tracing::warn
  across Messages, Threads, Agents, and Projects screens
- fix(installer): persist migration marker when no Python DB exists
- feat(tui): message attachment count badge in message list view
- fix(core): normalize timestamp precision for ATC participation tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
